# PHIL.108 ? Think in Bets

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** decision_making
**Subcategory:** think_in_bets
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Frame decisions as bets with odds and stakes rather than binary right/wrong

## Application
Acknowledge uncertainty, assign probabilities, size bets appropriately, update based on outcomes

## Tags
philosophy, decision-making, think-in-bets
